name: Zscaler Internet Access
description: Cloud security platform providing secure internet access, URL filtering, firewall policies, and DLP. Monitor user access, firewall rules, admin roles, and data loss prevention policies.

credentialFields.label: ZIA Cloud Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Zscaler cloud name. Valid values: zscaler, zscalerone, zscalertwo, zscalerthree, zscloud, zscalerbeta. Found in your ZIA admin portal URL (e.g., admin.zscalerone.net means cloud name is 'zscalerone').

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: ZIA Cloud Service API key. Found in ZIA Admin Portal > Administration > Cloud Service API Security > Cloud Service API Key.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all ZIA managed users to verify employee access configuration and review active user accounts.

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Reviews ZIA firewall filtering rules and URL filtering policies to verify security controls are properly configured.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews ZIA admin users and their assigned roles to ensure proper role-based access control is configured.

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Reviews ZIA DLP dictionaries and web DLP rules to verify data loss prevention policies are configured to protect sensitive data.
